    Mk/Uses/tcl.mk: remove support for Tcl/Tk 8.5

    In preparation for removing the lang/tcl85 and x11-toolkits/tk85 ports.
    The 8.5 series is EOL.

    PR:             278098
    Approved by:    antoine (portmgr, exp-run)

 lang/tclX/Makefile                      |   5 --
